name: X-Golf Stratford
address: Across from Trumbull Target, 345 Hawley Ln, Stratford, CT 06614
about: X-Golf Stratford is an indoor golf simulator venue in Connecticut featuring 10 state-of-the-art simulators. The facility offers a relaxed atmosphere suitable for players of all ages and skill levels, providing virtual play on bucket-list courses, competitive leagues, private events, and lessons. The venue is open daily with extended evening hours on weekends and features a full bar with food and beverage packages to complement the golf experience. Pricing is structured at $55 per hour Monday-Thursday and $65 per hour Friday-Sunday, with online booking available.
why_golfers_like_it: Play 18 holes on world-renowned courses in about 60 minutes
State-of-the-art simulator technology with high-speed cameras, lasers, and impact sensors
Full food and beverage service with a modern lounge and bar area

food_and_drink.notes: Food & Beverage packages available; full kitchen service
Full liquor, beer, wine & seltzer selection; large draft selection & craft beer

simulator_hardware.notes: Proprietary high-speed cameras, lasers, optical and impact sensors

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs or rentals are likely available at the venue.

faq.question: Can I bring outside food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not allowed; the venue offers a full menu and bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: You can play 18 holes on bucket-list courses in about 60 minutes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, X-Golf Stratford welcomes players of all ages and skill levels.
